# Clarity Into Momentum

> Science-based health and wellness coaching for women navigating burnout, disconnection, and identity transitions. 1:1 virtual sessions with certified coach Cylee Lee, based in Cache Valley, Utah, serving clients anywhere via Zoom.

## About

Clarity Into Momentum is the private coaching practice of Cylee Lee, a Certified Health & Life Coach and Advanced Health & Wellness Coach (Health Coach Institute), currently completing NBHWC board certification. Cylee helps women — especially busy moms and women 40+ — who feel stuck, foggy, or far from themselves find their way back to a life that feels like theirs.

Her approach draws on Motivational Interviewing, ACT-informed coaching, habit and behavior-change science, and her own 9-domain Whole-Life Wheel framework. Coaching is forward-looking and distinct from therapy: sessions are 1:1 conversations that help clients find their own answers, not prescriptions.

## Programs (1:1, virtual, weekly 60-minute sessions)

- Clear. Focused. Forward. — 4 weeks. "The reset." For the woman who feels foggy, flat, or far from herself and wants clarity fast. Founding rate $360 (through Dec 31, 2026), then $400.
- Momentum — 8 weeks. "The turning point." For the woman tired of the start-stop cycle, ready to change the beliefs underneath it. Founding rate $720 or 2 payments of $360 (through Dec 31, 2026), then $800.
- The Whole-Life Rebuild — 12 weeks. "The deep work." A full rebuild across all nine areas of life. Founding rate $1,080 or 3 monthly payments of $360 (through Dec 31, 2026), then $1,200.

All programs include a free 30-minute clarity call first, where Cylee honestly recommends which program fits — or whether coaching is the right step at all.

## Free resources

- The Clarity Starter Kit (free download): The Whole-Life Snapshot, Energy Audit, Identity Reset Prompts, 5-Pillar Checklist, and A Letter from Cylee — https://clarityintomomentum.com/resources.html

- [Home](https://clarityintomomentum.com/): Overview and who coaching is for

- [About Cylee](https://clarityintomomentum.com/about.html): Credentials and story

- [Book a free clarity call](https://clarityintomomentum.com/contact.html): Scheduling via Calendly
